title: lowonfire[no fire on screen]
description: Removes the fire overlay for a clearer screen and better gameplay visibility helps in pvp
body:
🔥 ProSlowOnFire

A simple and lightweight client-side mod that removes the fire overlay when the player is on fire, giving you a clear view of your screen.

✨ Features
- Removes fire overlay completely
- Improves visibility while burning
- Lightweight and fast
- Useful for PvP and survival gameplay

⚙️ Requirements
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API

📦 Compatibility
- Minecraft 1.21.1
- Client-side only (works on all servers)
- Works in singleplayer

💡 Notes
This mod only affects your screen and does not change any gameplay mechanics.

❤️ Credits
Made by Vedas
